problem.title: Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters
problem.description: Given a string s, find the length of the longest substring without repeating characters.
assumptions: Return length of the longest substring without repeating characters.

example.explanation: "abc" has length 3 with no repeating characters. Sliding window with seen-char index map.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Sliding Window with HashSet [✓ Interviewer Accepted]
solutions.description: Use a sliding window bounded by two pointers and a HashSet that tracks characters currently in the window. When the right pointer encounters a duplicate character, the left pointer advances and removes characters from the set until the duplicate is gone. At every step the window is guaranteed to be duplicate-free, so the maximum window length is the answer.

complexity.space: O(min(m, n)) where m is charset size
